ksa_text: Knowledge of data storytelling and narrative frameworks for presenting data insights to leadership, including visual communication principles, compelling narrative construction, and methods for translating analytical findings into actionable business recommendations.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy falls outside the primary competency scope of the BI Director. This knowledge KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Leadership & Strategy truly out-of-scope for the BI Director? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Leadership & Strategy as a core or recommended competency for the BI Director. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Leadership & Strategy falls outside the established competency profile for the BI Director. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy is outside the competency scope of the BI Director. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
